map_npcs.name: Wandering Trainer
map_npcs.pre_combat_dialogue: Fight me or fight me, the choice is yours!

map_npcs.name: Wandering Trainer
map_npcs.pre_combat_dialogue: It's a me, and I'm your problem now!

map_npcs.name: Wandering Trainer
map_npcs.pre_combat_dialogue: You ever get the feeling you've been here before?

map_npcs.name: Wandering Trainer
map_npcs.pre_combat_dialogue: Hey, so I might be a little lost.

map_npcs.name: Wandering Trainer
map_npcs.pre_combat_dialogue: Oh how nice, you came all the way here just to lose!

map_npcs.name: Wandering Trainer
map_npcs.pre_combat_dialogue: Martial-type? No, I don't think that's a thing.

map_npcs.name: Wandering Trainer
map_npcs.pre_combat_dialogue: Sometimes I like to stand in the middle of empty rooms and contemplate life.
